action.reasoning: Observation: FlashAttention2 not installed. Previous training was broken with only 1 metric point and 0% accuracy. Analysis: Need to remove flash_attention_2, fix training loop with proper label masking. Decision: Complete rewrite of train.py with sdpa attention, proper label construction, train 2 epochs, then validate and submit.
